# sha256

```go
import "crypto/sha256"
```

Package sha256 implements the SHA224 and SHA256 hash algorithms as defined in FIPS 180\-4.

## Index

- [Constants](<#constants>)
- [func New\(\) hash.Hash](<#New>)
- [func New224\(\) hash.Hash](<#New224>)
- [func Sum224\(data \[\]byte\) \[Size224\]byte](<#Sum224>)
- [func Sum256\(data \[\]byte\) \[Size\]byte](<#Sum256>)

## Constants

<a name="BlockSize"></a>The blocksize of SHA256 and SHA224 in bytes.

```go
const BlockSize = 64
```

<a name="Size"></a>The size of a SHA256 checksum in bytes.

```go
const Size = 32
```

<a name="Size224"></a>The size of a SHA224 checksum in bytes.

```go
const Size224 = 28
```

<a name="New"></a>

## func [New](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/sha256/sha256.go#L34>)

```go
func New() hash.Hash
```

New returns a new [hash.Hash](<https://pkg.go.dev/hash/#Hash>) computing the SHA256 checksum. The Hash also implements [encoding.BinaryMarshaler](<https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/#BinaryMarshaler>), [encoding.BinaryAppender](<https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/#BinaryAppender>) and [encoding.BinaryUnmarshaler](<https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/#BinaryUnmarshaler>) to marshal and unmarshal the internal state of the hash.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
	"fmt"
)

func main() {
	h := sha256.New()
	h.Write([]byte("hello world\n"))
	fmt.Printf("%x", h.Sum(nil))
}
```

#### Output

```go
a948904f2f0f479b8f8197694b30184b0d2ed1c1cd2a1ec0fb85d299a192a447
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (File)</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"log"
	"os"
)

func main() {
	f, err := os.Open("file.txt")
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer f.Close()

	h := sha256.New()
	if _, err := io.Copy(h, f); err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	fmt.Printf("%x", h.Sum(nil))
}
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="New224"></a>

## func [New224](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/sha256/sha256.go#L45>)

```go
func New224() hash.Hash
```

New224 returns a new [hash.Hash](<https://pkg.go.dev/hash/#Hash>) computing the SHA224 checksum. The Hash also implements [encoding.BinaryMarshaler](<https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/#BinaryMarshaler>), [encoding.BinaryAppender](<https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/#BinaryAppender>) and [encoding.BinaryUnmarshaler](<https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/#BinaryUnmarshaler>) to marshal and unmarshal the internal state of the hash.

<a name="Sum224"></a>

## func [Sum224](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/sha256/sha256.go#L65>)

```go
func Sum224(data []byte) [Size224]byte
```

Sum224 returns the SHA224 checksum of the data.

<a name="Sum256"></a>

## func [Sum256](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/sha256/sha256.go#L53>)

```go
func Sum256(data []byte) [Size]byte
```

Sum256 returns the SHA256 checksum of the data.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
	"fmt"
)

func main() {
	sum := sha256.Sum256([]byte("hello world\n"))
	fmt.Printf("%x", sum)
}
```

#### Output

```go
a948904f2f0f479b8f8197694b30184b0d2ed1c1cd2a1ec0fb85d299a192a447
```

</p>
</details>
